response.global_analysis: The video starts with a spoken introduction by Iofi, which has been transcribed and translated. The song portion phonetically matches the first half of the provided Reference JSON, but the video continues into the second verse and bridge, which I have transcribed directly from the audio and on-screen context. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, and mid-sentence pauses are handled by splitting blocks. On-screen text for the song credits has also been included.

subtitles.original: Yes, yes, yes, yes.
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes, yes.

subtitles.original: So...
subtitles.english: So...

subtitles.original: あのメンゲの皆は も知ってると思いますけど
subtitles.english: I think everyone in membership already knows,

subtitles.original: あの普通はギターは メンゲでしか弾いてないんだけど
subtitles.english: but I usually only play the guitar in membership streams.

subtitles.original: これがメンゲじゃない配信で初めてです!
subtitles.english: This is the first time in a non-membership stream!

subtitles.original: ちょっと怖いんだけど、まあまあまあ
subtitles.english: I'm a bit nervous, but, well, well, well...

subtitles.original: どうでしたか? どうどう?
subtitles.english: How was it? How was it?

subtitles.original: 可愛い? 可愛い?
subtitles.english: Is it cute? Is it cute?

subtitles.original: いっぱいスクショ撮った?
subtitles.english: Did you take lots of screenshots?

subtitles.original: スクショ撮った?
subtitles.english: Did you take screenshots?

subtitles.original: I hope you enjoyed it!
subtitles.english: I hope you enjoyed it!

subtitles.original: And by the way, we still have a lot of more going on.
subtitles.english: And by the way, we still have a lot of more going on.

subtitles.original: So after this, there's going to be a lot and lot of guests!
subtitles.english: So after this, there's going to be a lot and lot of guests!

subtitles.original: So please wait for it!
subtitles.english: So please wait for it!

subtitles.original: このあともゲストが盛りだくさんなので 楽しみに待ってて...
subtitles.english: There will be plenty of guests after this, so please look forward...

subtitles.original: ...待っててくださいね! Don't forget to take screenshots!
subtitles.english: ...to it! Don't forget to take a lot of screenshots!

subtitles.original: 可愛い? Lagi?
subtitles.english: Cute? More?

subtitles.original: Lucu? Lucu? Lucu? Lucu?
subtitles.english: Cute? Cute? Cute? Cute?

subtitles.original: まあね 時間があれば これもね またギター弾きたいなと思っております
subtitles.english: Well, if there's time, I'd like to play the guitar again.

subtitles.original: はい!
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: Okay, 準備オッケー オッケー オッケー オッケー
subtitles.english: Okay, preparation okay. Okay, okay, okay.

subtitles.original: Sip!
subtitles.english: Sip!

subtitles.original: では ゲストパートにまた会おうね!
subtitles.english: Then, let's meet again in the guest part!

subtitles.original: Thank you! See you guys in guest part!
subtitles.english: Thank you! See you guys in guest part!

subtitles.original:
THERE IS A REASON
Lyrics: 岩愛理 Music: ヒグドライバー
subtitles.english:
THERE IS A REASON
Lyrics: Airi Iwata Music: Higdriver

subtitles.original: どこから話せばいいんだろう
subtitles.english: Where should I begin to tell you?

subtitles.original: 待ちくたびれても
subtitles.english: Even if I get tired of waiting,

subtitles.original: 終わりだなんて言わせないから
subtitles.english: I won't let you tell me it's over.

subtitles.original: 書きなぐった無意識の衝動をつれて
subtitles.english: With the unconscious impulse that I scribbled down,

subtitles.original: 何かもかも壊したら
subtitles.english: If I break everything,

subtitles.original: 不可能を始めればいいんだ
subtitles.english: I can just begin the impossible.

subtitles.original: There's a reason that we came across in this world
subtitles.english: There's a reason that we came across in this world

subtitles.original: There's a reason that we caught the magnetic wave
subtitles.english: There's a reason that we caught the magnetic wave

subtitles.original: 傷つけ合う worldはどこへ
subtitles.english: Where is the world where we hurt each other going?

subtitles.original: 空の果て 届くよう
subtitles.english: Reaching the end of the sky,

subtitles.original: 愛のために泣けるのは
subtitles.english: The reason I can cry for the sake of love

subtitles.original: 君がそこにいるから
subtitles.english: Is because you are there.

subtitles.original: 君だけを呼び続け 歌うから
subtitles.english: Because I will keep calling only for you and singing,

subtitles.original: 愛のために歌うのは
subtitles.english: The reason I sing for the sake of love,

subtitles.original: そして共に生きること
subtitles.english: And living together,

subtitles.original: ずっと ずっと 君と
subtitles.english: Always, always, with you.

subtitles.original: 青色した空と波ひとつない鏡のような
subtitles.english: The blue sky and the mirror-like sea without a single wave...

subtitles.original: 海を見ていた
subtitles.english: ...I was watching.

subtitles.original: どんな場所に立って
subtitles.english: No matter where I stand,

subtitles.original: どんな形になって
subtitles.english: No matter what form I take,

subtitles.original: どんな時代にだって
subtitles.english: No matter what era it is,

subtitles.original: 見つけ出すよ
subtitles.english: I will find you.

subtitles.original: いまをつづりにした さだめにさからって
subtitles.english: Defying the destiny that has scripted the present.

subtitles.original: There's a reason that we came across in this world
subtitles.english: There's a reason that we came across in this world

subtitles.original: There's a reason that we caught the magnetic wave
subtitles.english: There's a reason that we caught the magnetic wave

subtitles.original: 引き寄せ合う 二人はどこへ
subtitles.english: Where are we, drawn to each other, going?

subtitles.original: 愛のために進むのは
subtitles.english: The reason I move forward for the sake of love,

subtitles.original: 君がここにいるから
subtitles.english: Is because you are here.

subtitles.original: 僕だけが君を 守るから
subtitles.english: Because only I will protect you,

subtitles.original: 愛のために願うのは
subtitles.english: The reason I wish for the sake of love,

subtitles.original: そして誰も傷つけずに
subtitles.english: And without hurting anyone,

subtitles.original: ずっと 隣で
subtitles.english: Always, by your side.

subtitles.original: 僕らは越えていく
subtitles.english: We will cross over...

subtitles.original: すべての憎しみを
subtitles.english: ...all the hatred.

subtitles.original: 偽物の正義など
subtitles.english: Fake justice and such,

subtitles.original: 捨ててしまえ
subtitles.english: Throw it all away.

subtitles.original: 愛のために泣けるのは
subtitles.english: The reason I can cry for the sake of love

subtitles.original: 君がそこにいるから
subtitles.english: Is because you are there.

subtitles.original: We will always...
subtitles.english: We will always...
